---
title: "Question 4 - Paired t-test (Training effectiveness)"
author: "Upayan Mazumder"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
alpha <- 0.05
```

## Question

The prior and after-training scores of 10 candidates are given. Test whether training is effective.

```{r data}
prior <- c(84, 48, 36, 37, 54, 69, 83, 96, 90, 65)
after <- c(90, 58, 56, 49, 62, 81, 84, 86, 84, 75)

data.frame(Candidate = 1:10, Prior = prior, After = after, Improvement = after - prior)
```

## Hypotheses

- H0: mean(After - Prior) <= 0
- H1: mean(After - Prior) > 0 (training is effective)

```{r paired-t-test}
result <- t.test(after, prior, paired = TRUE, alternative = "greater")
result
```

```{r decision}
if (result$p.value < alpha) {
  cat("Decision: Reject H0 at 5% significance level.\n")
  cat("Conclusion: Training is effective (mean score increased significantly).")
} else {
  cat("Decision: Fail to reject H0 at 5% significance level.\n")
  cat("Conclusion: Not enough evidence to claim training effectiveness.")
}
```
